name: Legal: conflicting contract terms (delivery date)
task: Two contract excerpts specify different delivery dates. Ingest them as evidence, propose one claim per date, link evidence spans as support for each claim, and declare a tension between the conflicting delivery-date claims. Export the investigation as .chronicle.

documents.content: Contract A, Clause 3: The vendor shall deliver by March 1, 2024. Signed Party A.
documents.title: contract_a_clause3.txt

documents.content: Contract B, Amendment: Delivery date is April 15, 2024. Signed Party B.
documents.title: contract_b_amendment.txt

documents.content: Summary: conflicting delivery terms — March 1 vs April 15; resolve before production.
documents.title: summary.txt
